name: Foreign Affiliate Deduction for Plan Contributions

eligibility.description: Applies when U.S. employees of a foreign affiliate are covered by the American parent's qualified plan under a 3121(l) agreement.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows a foreign affiliate to take a deduction for contributions made to a qualified plan on behalf of U.S. employees treated as employees of the American parent.
